title: Bank Account Summary II
description: Find account names and balances for accounts with total balance > 10000.
constraints: account is the primary key of Users
transaction_id is the primary key of Transactions
amount can be positive (credit) or negative (debit)
account in Transactions is a foreign key referencing Users.account
key_concept: JOIN + GROUP BY + HAVING SUM() > threshold.

hints.L1: Join Users and Transactions, group by account, sum amounts, filter sum > 10000.
hints.L2: JOIN on account → GROUP BY u.name → HAVING SUM(amount) > 10000
hints.L3: SELECT u.name, SUM(t.amount) AS balance FROM Users u JOIN Transactions t ON u.account = t.account GROUP BY u.account HAVING balance > 10000
